requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — IRAM S-mark, IRAM-IEC 62368-1, Argentine Type-I Plug (IRAM 2073), 220V/50Hz
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——IRAM S-mark、IRAM-IEC 62368-1、阿根廷I型插头（IRAM 2073）、220V/50Hz
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——IRAM S-mark、IRAM-IEC 62368-1、阿根廷I型插頭（IRAM 2073）、220V/50Hz

summary.en: Electrical safety in Argentina is governed by IRAM (Instituto Argentino de Normalización y Certificación), which publishes IRAM-IEC harmonised standards. For audio, video, and IT equipment — including Wi-Fi routers, smart speakers, and consumer IoT devices — the applicable safety standard is IRAM-IEC 62368-1 (harmonising IEC 62368-1), replacing the earlier IRAM-IEC 60950-1. The S-mark (Sello IRAM) is the Argentine voluntary-but-market-expected electrical safety certification mark; products bearing the S-mark have been tested and certified by IRAM to the applicable IRAM-IEC standard. Argentina operates on 220V / 50Hz. Argentina uses the type-I plug defined by IRAM 2073, which features three flat angled pins in a triangular arrangement — this is visually similar to but legally and dimensionally distinct from the Australian AS/NZS 3112 type-I plug and the two variants are not fully interchangeable. Chinese products designed for the type-A or type-I Australian plug require plug replacement or a certified Argentine-compatible power supply to comply. Spanish-language safety labelling and warnings are required on the Argentine market.
summary.zh: 阿根廷的电气安全由IRAM（阿根廷国家标准化与认证研究院）负责管理，其发布IRAM-IEC协调标准。对于音视频和IT设备——包括Wi-Fi路由器、智能音箱和消费级物联网设备——适用的安全标准为IRAM-IEC 62368-1（对应IEC 62368-1），取代早期的IRAM-IEC 60950-1。S-mark（Sello IRAM）是阿根廷自愿性但市场普遍预期的电气安全认证标志；贴有S-mark的产品已由IRAM按适用的IRAM-IEC标准进行检测和认证。阿根廷采用220V / 50Hz。阿根廷使用IRAM 2073规定的I型插头，具有三个扁平斜插脚呈三角形排列——外观与澳大利亚AS/NZS 3112 I型插头相似，但在法律和尺寸上有所不同，两者不完全可互换。针对A型或澳大利亚I型插头设计的中国产品，须更换插头或使用经认证的阿根廷兼容电源以满足合规要求。阿根廷市场要求使用西班牙语安全标签和警告。
summary.zht: 阿根廷的電氣安全由IRAM（阿根廷國家標準化與認證研究院）負責管理，其發布IRAM-IEC協調標準。對於音視頻和IT設備——包括Wi-Fi路由器、智慧音箱和消費級物聯網裝置——適用的安全標準為IRAM-IEC 62368-1（對應IEC 62368-1），取代早期的IRAM-IEC 60950-1。S-mark（Sello IRAM）是阿根廷自願性但市場普遍預期的電氣安全認證標誌；貼有S-mark的產品已由IRAM按適用的IRAM-IEC標準進行檢測和認證。阿根廷採用220V / 50Hz。阿根廷使用IRAM 2073規定的I型插頭，具有三個扁平斜插腳呈三角形排列——外觀與澳大利亞AS/NZS 3112 I型插頭相似，但在法律和尺寸上有所不同，兩者不完全可互換。針對A型或澳大利亞I型插頭設計的中國產品，須更換插頭或使用經認證的阿根廷相容電源以滿足合規要求。阿根廷市場要求使用西班牙語安全標籤和警告。

standards_or_laws: IRAM-IEC 62368-1 — audio, video, and IT equipment safety standard in Argentina (harmonises IEC 62368-1)
IRAM 2073 — Argentine type-I plug and socket standard (three-flat-pin angled, 220V/50Hz); distinct from Australian AS/NZS 3112
S-mark (Sello IRAM) — IRAM electrical safety certification mark; voluntary but widely expected by Argentine retail and import chains

summary.en: In China, electrical safety for audio, video, IT, and telecommunications equipment is governed by GB 4943.1 (harmonising IEC 60950-1, transitioning to GB/T 4943.1 for IEC 62368-1). CCC (China Compulsory Certification) is mandatory for in-scope product categories including IT equipment, audio and video apparatus, and certain IoT devices. China operates on 220V/50Hz but uses the type-A (two flat parallel pins) or type-I (three pins, Chinese variant GB 2099.3) plug. CCC safety certification and GB 4943.1 / GB/T 4943.1 test reports are not recognised by IRAM and do not satisfy Argentine S-mark or IRAM-IEC 62368-1 requirements. The Argentine type-I plug (IRAM 2073) is physically different from the Chinese GB 2099.3 type-I variant.
summary.zh: 在中国，音视频、IT和电信设备的电气安全受GB 4943.1（对应IEC 60950-1，向IEC 62368-1的GB/T 4943.1过渡）约束。CCC（中国强制认证）对范围内产品类别（包括IT设备、音视频设备和特定物联网设备）为强制要求。中国采用220V/50Hz，但使用A型（两个扁平并联插脚）或I型（三插脚，中国版本GB 2099.3）插头。CCC安全认证和GB 4943.1 / GB/T 4943.1检测报告不被IRAM承认，不满足阿根廷S-mark或IRAM-IEC 62368-1要求。阿根廷I型插头（IRAM 2073）与中国GB 2099.3 I型变体在物理上有所不同。
summary.zht: 在中國，音視頻、IT和電信設備的電氣安全受GB 4943.1（對應IEC 60950-1，向IEC 62368-1的GB/T 4943.1過渡）約束。CCC（中國強制認證）對範圍內產品類別（包括IT設備、音視頻設備和特定物聯網裝置）為強制要求。中國採用220V/50Hz，但使用A型（兩個扁平並聯插腳）或I型（三插腳，中國版本GB 2099.3）插頭。CCC安全認證和GB 4943.1 / GB/T 4943.1檢測報告不被IRAM承認，不滿足阿根廷S-mark或IRAM-IEC 62368-1要求。阿根廷I型插頭（IRAM 2073）與中國GB 2099.3 I型變體在物理上有所不同。

standards_or_laws: GB 4943.1 / GB/T 4943.1 (harmonises IEC 60950-1 / IEC 62368-1) — electrical safety for IT and AV equipment in China
CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — mandatory electrical safety certification for in-scope product categories in China
GB 2099.3 — Chinese type-I plug and socket standard; dimensionally distinct from Argentine IRAM 2073 type-I

gap.en: Chinese CCC electrical safety certification and GB 4943.1 / GB/T 4943.1 test reports are not accepted by IRAM as satisfying Argentine IRAM-IEC 62368-1 or S-mark requirements. Separate electrical safety testing to IRAM-IEC 62368-1 by an IRAM-accredited laboratory is required to obtain the S-mark. The Argentine type-I plug per IRAM 2073 is distinct from the Chinese GB 2099.3 type-I variant and from the Australian AS/NZS 3112 type-I — products with other plug types must be re-plugged or supplied with Argentine-compatible power adapters. Argentina's 220V/50Hz power system means products designed for lower-voltage markets require a suitable universal power supply.
gap.zh: 中国CCC电气安全认证和GB 4943.1 / GB/T 4943.1检测报告不被IRAM接受为满足阿根廷IRAM-IEC 62368-1或S-mark要求。须由IRAM认可的实验室按IRAM-IEC 62368-1进行独立电气安全检测，以取得S-mark认证。阿根廷IRAM 2073 I型插头与中国GB 2099.3 I型变体及澳大利亚AS/NZS 3112 I型插头均有所不同——使用其他插头类型的产品须更换插头或配备阿根廷兼容电源适配器。阿根廷的220V/50Hz供电系统意味着为低电压市场设计的产品须配备合适的通用电源。
gap.zht: 中國CCC電氣安全認證和GB 4943.1 / GB/T 4943.1檢測報告不被IRAM接受為滿足阿根廷IRAM-IEC 62368-1或S-mark要求。須由IRAM認可的實驗室按IRAM-IEC 62368-1進行獨立電氣安全檢測，以取得S-mark認證。阿根廷IRAM 2073 I型插頭與中國GB 2099.3 I型變體及澳大利亞AS/NZS 3112 I型插頭均有所不同——使用其他插頭類型的產品須更換插頭或配備阿根廷相容電源適配器。阿根廷的220V/50Hz供電系統意味著為低電壓市場設計的產品須配備合適的通用電源。

mandatory_status.target: S-mark is voluntary but widely required in practice by Argentine retail and import channels; IRAM-IEC 62368-1 compliance mandatory for safe market access; Argentine type-I plug (IRAM 2073) and 220V/50Hz power system are mandatory product requirements
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification required for in-scope IT, AV, and electrical product categories sold in China

source.publisher: IRAM — Instituto Argentino de Normalización y Certificación (Argentina)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Argentina requires electrical safety compliance to IRAM-IEC 62368-1 assessed by an IRAM-accredited laboratory; the S-mark (Sello IRAM) is the recognised certification mark. Chinese CCC and GB 4943.1 test reports are not accepted. The Argentine type-I plug per IRAM 2073 is distinct from Australian and Chinese type-I variants — verify plug compatibility and power-supply ratings for 220V/50Hz. Spanish-language safety warnings are required on Argentine market products. Verify current S-mark programme scope and IRAM-accredited laboratory availability with a qualified Argentine regulatory professional.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 阿根廷要求由IRAM认可的实验室按IRAM-IEC 62368-1进行电气安全合规评估；S-mark（Sello IRAM）为公认的认证标志。中国CCC和GB 4943.1检测报告不被接受。阿根廷IRAM 2073 I型插头与澳大利亚和中国I型变体不同——须核验插头兼容性和220V/50Hz电源参数。阿根廷市场产品须有西班牙语安全警告。请向合格的阿根廷监管专业人士核验现行S-mark计划范围和IRAM认可实验室的可用情况。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 阿根廷要求由IRAM認可的實驗室按IRAM-IEC 62368-1進行電氣安全合規評估；S-mark（Sello IRAM）為公認的認證標誌。中國CCC和GB 4943.1檢測報告不被接受。阿根廷IRAM 2073 I型插頭與澳大利亞和中國I型變體不同——須核驗插頭相容性和220V/50Hz電源參數。阿根廷市場產品須有西班牙語安全警告。請向合格的阿根廷監管專業人士核驗現行S-mark計畫範圍和IRAM認可實驗室的可用情況。
